title: Document test-only auto-commit suppression behavior
description: Capture the intent and usage of the RepositoryStorage._auto_commit test switch in the most local maintainable place, keeping the change scoped to developer-facing context rather than user-facing product docs.
acceptance_criteria: Developer-facing documentation or inline test context explains that _auto_commit is a test-only suppression switch with default production behavior left enabled.
Any note added makes clear that BeadAutoCommitTests are the explicit coverage point for real git commit behavior.
No unrelated user-facing documentation changes are introduced.
